title: I will fix WordPress page speed and Core Web Vitals
description: Is your WooCommerce checkout slow and costing sales? I manually optimize WordPress stores, reduce bottlenecks caused by themes and plugins, and deliver a clear speed audit with fixes.

faq.question: What access do you need before starting?
faq.answer: WordPress admin and hosting or CDN access if relevant.

faq.question: Do you work on WooCommerce stores?
faq.answer: Yes, especially stores slowed down by plugins, heavy themes, and checkout bottlenecks.

competitors.title: I will fix WordPress Core Web Vitals and GTmetrix score
competitors.description_excerpt: Manual WordPress speed optimization for mobile and desktop scores.

competitors.title: I will optimize WooCommerce speed and PageSpeed Insights
competitors.description_excerpt: Checkout and product-page performance fixes for WordPress stores.

reviews.text: Went from 47 to 93 on PageSpeed and the checkout feels much faster now.
Great communication and real GTmetrix improvements for our WooCommerce store.

buyer_messages: My WooCommerce checkout is slow and I think it is killing conversions.
Can you improve Core Web Vitals without breaking the design?
